prompt: A small medieval timber-framed cottage with whitewashed daub walls, a single ground-floor room with a stone hearth, and a sleeping loft above under a steep thatched gabled roof.
A square medieval stone keep with four round corner turrets, crenellated battlements, a great hall on the first floor above a vaulted undercroft, and an arched gatehouse entrance.
A tall round medieval watchtower of rough stone with arrow-slit windows, a spiral staircase winding to a crenellated lookout platform, and a small guardroom at its base.
A medieval post-windmill on a stone roundhouse base, with four lattice sails, a grain-grinding floor, and a storage loft under a shingled cap.
A medieval tithe barn with tall cruck timber frames, stone footings, wide cart doors at each gable end, and a long steep thatched roof over an open threshing floor.
A whimsical fantasy cottage built into a mossy hillside, with crooked dark-timber beams, round purple-glass windows, a curling chimney, and a turf roof draped in vines.
A soaring fantasy wizard's castle of pale stone and blackstone, with tall spired towers, glowing sea-lantern windows, a raised central keep, and a vaulted enchantment hall.
A mystic fantasy shrine of moss-covered stone and purpur, with a crystal-domed sanctum, glowing prismarine pillars, and a central altar lit by sea lanterns.
A towering fantasy archway monument of blackstone etched with glowing runes, two carved guardian statues flanking a portal, raised on a stepped plaza.
A slender fantasy lighthouse of swirling stone and prismarine, crowned with a sea-lantern beacon, a spiral inner stair, and a keeper's nook ringed with glowing crystals.
A narrow three-story gothic townhouse of dark stone with pointed-arch windows, steep gabled dormers, an iron-banded door, and tall stained-glass panes on the upper floor.
A gothic cathedral with a towering nave, a pointed ribbed-vault ceiling, flying buttresses, a rose stained-glass window over the entrance, and twin bell spires.
A gothic stone mausoleum with a pointed-arch portico, tall narrow stained-glass windows on each side, carved pinnacles, and a central tomb under a ribbed vault.
A dark gothic fortress with pointed towers, spiked iron gates, a buttressed great hall lit by tall stained-glass windows, and a shadowed inner courtyard.
A gothic apothecary shop on a cobbled lane, with a pointed-arch shopfront, a leaded bay window, a cluttered counter room below, and a study with tall narrow windows above.
A symmetrical renaissance villa of smooth sandstone with a central columned portico, round-arched windows in even bays, a frescoed reception hall, and a low hipped roof.
A renaissance domed church with a classical pedimented entrance, symmetrical round-arched windows, a ribbed central dome over the crossing, and a marble-floored nave.
A renaissance triumphal arch of rusticated stone with three arched openings, paired pilasters supporting a carved entablature, atop a broad stepped base.
A renaissance palazzo-fortress with symmetrical rusticated stone facades, corner bastions, an arcaded inner courtyard, a grand staircase, and a columned great hall.
A renaissance brick tower windmill with an ogee cap, four canvas sails, round-arched openings, a milling floor, and a balconied gallery above symmetrical gardens.
A two-story modern house of white concrete and glass, with an open-plan living and kitchen space, floor-to-ceiling windows, a cantilevered upper bedroom, and a flat roof terrace.
A sleek modern boutique with a full glass storefront, a minimalist open retail floor, a floating staircase to a mezzanine office, and a flat concrete canopy.
A modern memorial of polished concrete and glass: a tall angular monolith on a reflecting plaza, with an internal lit chamber and a cantilevered viewing ledge.
A modern glass office tower with stacked open floors, a steel-and-glass curtain wall, a ground-floor lobby atrium, and a flat rooftop mechanical deck.
A modern lighthouse of white concrete, a cylindrical shaft with ribbon windows, a glass lantern room with a beacon, and compact keeper's quarters at the base.
A single-story minimalist house of white concrete and clear glass, one open living space, a single accent wall, an unbroken flat roof, and almost no ornament.
A minimalist gallery shop: a white-box open floor lit by a clerestory, a single long display counter, a huge frameless glass front, and a flat roof.
A minimalist meditation hall, a serene white-concrete cube with a single tall slit of light, an empty central floor, a reflecting threshold, and a flat roof.
A minimalist observation tower, a clean white-concrete shaft with a single glazed stair, topped by a glass-walled viewing room under a thin flat slab.
A minimalist monument: a pure white-concrete cube raised on a low plinth, split by a single narrow lit gap, on an empty paved square.
A whitewashed mediterranean villa with a blue-domed roof, stepped flat terraces, deep-set arched windows, a vine-shaded pergola, and narrow stairs between levels.
A whitewashed mediterranean lighthouse on a rocky base, a round stone tower with blue-trimmed windows, a glass lantern room, and a small keeper's cottage.
A mediterranean market shop with whitewashed walls, a blue-shuttered arched storefront, a tiled counter room, and a small terracotta-roofed loft above.
A whitewashed mediterranean tower windmill with a conical wooden cap, triangular cloth sails, a round milling room, and small deep-set windows.
A mediterranean hillside chapel of whitewashed stone with a blue dome, a small arched portico, deep-set windows, and a single bell niche over the door.
A japanese machiya townhouse with dark timber posts, white shoji-screen walls, tatami floors, a raised engawa porch, and a low tiled gabled roof.
A japanese temple with a multi-tier tiled roof and upturned eaves, dark timber columns, a raised platform, sliding screen walls, and a central shrine room.
A five-tier japanese pagoda with upturned tiled eaves on every level, a central timber staircase column, white screen walls, and a small shrine at the base.
A japanese teahouse shop with a noren-curtained entrance, a dark timber frame, shoji screens, a tatami seating room, and a small tiled gabled roof.
A japanese rice barn raised on timber stilts, with dark plank walls, a steep thatched roof, a single ladder entrance, and an open storage loft above the flood line.
A chinese siheyuan courtyard house with red timber columns, green-glazed tile roofs with upturned eaves, rooms around a central paved courtyard, and a screen wall at the gate.
A chinese temple with a sweeping green-glazed tile roof and upturned eaves, red lacquered columns, a raised stone platform, and a central hall with an altar.
A multi-story chinese pagoda with stacked upturned tile eaves, red columns, a central staircase, balconied galleries, and a shrine room at the base.
A chinese fortress gate-tower on a massive stone base, with a tiered green-tile roofed pavilion, red timber galleries, crenellations, and an arched tunnel gateway.
A chinese street shopfront with a green-tiled upturned-eave canopy, red lacquered columns, an open display counter below, and a living loft with lattice windows above.
A cozy rustic farmhouse of oak planks and mossy cobblestone, with a stone hearth in the main room, a small bedroom, a vegetable-garden porch, and a shingled gabled roof.
A rustic timber barn with weathered oak plank walls, a cobblestone foundation, wide double cart doors, a hayloft under the rafters, and a long mossy shingled roof.
A rustic watermill of oak timber and mossy cobblestone beside a stream, with a turning water wheel, a grinding room, and a grain loft under a shingled roof.
A rustic stone-and-timber lighthouse on a rocky shore, a tapered cobblestone tower with a wooden lantern gallery, a lantern beacon, and a small keeper's hut.
A rustic fieldstone tower with mossy cobblestone walls, small shuttered windows, a timber stair, a storage cellar, and a shingled conical cap.
